metadata.name: sss_token
metadata.description: Solana Stablecoin Standard - Token Program with blacklist, seize, freeze, and GENIUS Act compliance

accounts.name: allowlist_entry
docs: in the handler so missing accounts can return AllowlistEntryNotFound.

accounts.name: target_token_account
docs: The target's token account to freeze

accounts.name: target_token_account
docs: The target's token account to thaw — must belong to the blacklisted address

accounts.name: burn_token_account
docs: The token account to burn from. Must belong to this mint.
If self-burn: token::authority must equal burner.
If authority burn: burner must be master_authority and permanent delegate must be enabled.

accounts.name: mint
docs: We use UncheckedAccount because Token-2022 mints with extensions
must be created with specific extension space before initialization.

accounts.name: recipient_blacklist
docs: Optional blacklist entry for the recipient token account owner.
If SSS-2 is enabled and this account exists with data, mint is rejected.
Seeds derived from the actual on-chain owner of recipient_token_account
to prevent callers from spoofing a clean wallet.

accounts.name: from_token_account
docs: The token account to seize from (must be owned by the blacklisted address)

accounts.name: minter_wallet
docs: beyond zero-address check. Minter is activated separately via is_active flag.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller does not have the required role

errors.name: InvalidAuthority
errors.msg: Invalid authority for this operation

errors.name: ProgramPaused
errors.msg: Program is currently paused

errors.name: ProgramNotPaused
errors.msg: Program is not paused

errors.name: MinterNotActive
errors.msg: Minter is not active

errors.name: MintQuotaExceeded
errors.msg: Mint amount exceeds minter quota

errors.name: MintAmountZero
errors.msg: Mint amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: BurnAmountZero
errors.msg: Burn amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient balance for burn

errors.name: FeatureNotEnabled
errors.msg: Feature not enabled for this stablecoin preset

errors.name: BlacklistNotEnabled
errors.msg: Blacklist feature requires SSS-2 or higher preset

errors.name: TransferHookNotEnabled
errors.msg: Transfer hook feature requires SSS-2 or higher preset

errors.name: ConfidentialTransfersNotEnabled
errors.msg: Confidential transfers require SSS-3 preset

errors.name: CustomFlagsMissing
errors.msg: Custom preset requires all four feature flags to be specified

errors.name: CannotBlacklistAuthority
errors.msg: Cannot blacklist the master authority

errors.name: RecipientBlacklisted
errors.msg: Cannot mint to a blacklisted recipient

errors.name: NameTooLong
errors.msg: Name exceeds maximum length of 32 characters

errors.name: SymbolTooLong
errors.msg: Symbol exceeds maximum length of 10 characters

errors.name: UriTooLong
errors.msg: URI exceeds maximum length of 200 characters

errors.name: ReasonTooLong
errors.msg: Reason exceeds maximum length of 128 characters

errors.name: AllowlistReasonTooLong
errors.msg: Allowlist reason exceeds maximum length of 64 characters

errors.name: DetailsTooLong
errors.msg: Details exceeds maximum length of 256 characters

errors.name: InvalidDecimals
errors.msg: Invalid decimals value

errors.name: SameAuthority
errors.msg: Cannot transfer authority to the same address

errors.name: ZeroAuthority
errors.msg: New authority cannot be the zero address

errors.name: NoPendingAuthority
errors.msg: No pending authority nomination exists

errors.name: NotPendingAuthority
errors.msg: Signer is not the pending authority

errors.name: SeizeAmountZero
errors.msg: Seize amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: SeizeSameAccount
errors.msg: Source and destination accounts must be different

errors.name: InsufficientReserves
errors.msg: Reserve attestation requires reserves >= outstanding

errors.name: InvalidHookProgram
errors.msg: Invalid transfer hook program ID

errors.name: AllowlistEntryExists
errors.msg: Allowlist entry already exists

errors.name: AllowlistEntryNotFound
errors.msg: Allowlist entry not found

errors.name: SupplyCapExceeded
errors.msg: Mint would exceed the configured supply cap

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow
